# state

**Instance Property**

The current state of the Smart Card reader slot.

## Declaration

```swift
var state: TKSmartCardSlot.State { get }
```

## Discussion

Use Key-Value-Observing to be notified for changes to the state. For more information, see [https://developer.apple.com/library/archive/documentation/Cocoa/Conceptual/KeyValueObserving/KeyValueObserving.html#//apple_ref/doc/uid/10000177i].

## Getting the Slot State

- **TKSmartCardSlot.State**: All smart card slot states.
